users.bio: Packing our annual balikbayan box for the family in Bulacan. Every kilo counts!
Contributor mode: adding snacks, shoes, and whatever Mom says we still have room for.
Waiting by the door for the box. Salamat sa lahat, anak.
Documenting packing night — snacks, pasalubong, and one very full box.

posts.caption: First box of the year is underway — SPAM, salmon, vitamins, and Lola’s favorite oatmeal all in. Labeling tonight before the forwarder pickup. 📦🇵🇭
Haul day from Canada — Nutella, Spam, Coffee-mate, and everyone’s snack requests checked off the list. Now to fit it all in one box 😅
Kids’ corner of the box: Judy Moody books, domino set, and clothes for the cousins. They’re going to fight over who opens this first.
Almost full — LEGO, Quaker oats, Nesquik, and Dove are in. Flashlight on the side for Lolo’s garage. Sealing this weekend!
